name: Credit Against Heavy Vehicle Tax for Tire Tax Paid

eligibility.description: Available to purchasers of heavy trucks and trailers where the tires were subject to separate excise taxes.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Provides a credit against the 12% heavy vehicle retail tax for the amount of excise tax already paid on the tires sold with the vehicle under section 4071.
